zh.lifeSummary: 當Mauld Trussell於大約1341年出生在英國斯塔福爾布時，她的父親Warin de Trussell11339歲，母親Maud St Philbert16歲。她於1359年與John de Hastang結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年7月20日在英國瓦維其可爾享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mauld Trussell于大约1341年出生在英国斯塔福爾布时，她的父亲Warin de Trussell11339岁，母亲Maud St Philbert16岁。她于1359年与John de Hastang结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年7月20日在英国瓦維其可爾享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trussell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English trus(s)el(le) ‘bundle, parcel’ (Old French troussel), perhaps for a porter (see Truss ), or from the same word in the sense ‘stamp, mould (for stamping coins)’, for someone who minted coins.
variant of Thrussell, a nickname from Middle English thros(t)el, thrus(t)el ‘song thrush’ (Old English thros(t)le). Compare Thrush .

variants.name: Truss
meanings: English (mainly Essex and Middlesex): metonymic occupational name from Middle English trusse ‘bundle, package’ (Old French trousse), perhaps for a porter. See also Trussell .
Americanized form of Ukrainian Trus: nickname from trus ‘rabbit’, typically applied to someone thought to be a coward.

nameMeanings.name: Mauld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mauld Trussell was born about 1341, in Chebsey, Staffordshire, England, her father, Warin de Trussell, was 11339 and her mother, Maud St Philbert, was 16. She married John de Hastang in 1359. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 20 July 1369, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mauld Trussell est née environ 1341, à Chebsey, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Warin de Trussell, avait 11339 ans et sa mère, Maud St Philbert, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John de Hastang en 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1369, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mauld Trussell um 1341 in Chebsey, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Warin de Trussell 11339 und ihre Mutter Maud St Philbert 16. Sie hat 1359 John de Hastang geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juli 1369 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mauld Trussell è nata il circa 1341 nel Chebsey, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Warin de Trussell, aveva 11339 anni e sua madre, Maud St Philbert, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato John de Hastang nel 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 20 luglio 1369, nel Warwickshire, England, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mauld Trussellが約1341年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェブセイで生まれた時，父Warin de Trussellは11339歳，母Maud St Philbertは16歳であった。1359年にJohn de Hastangと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年7月20日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mauld Trussell(이)가 대략 1341년 영국 스태퍼드실르 체브시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warin de Trussell(은)는 11339세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud St Philbert(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1359년 John de Hastang(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 7월 20일 영국 워윅실르에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mauld Trussell nasceu aproximadamente 1341, em Chebsey, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Warin de Trussell, tinha 11339 anos e sua mãe, Maud St Philbert, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Hastang em 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de julho de 1369, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mauld Trussell родилась около 1341 г. в местности шебси, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Warin de Trussell было 11339 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud St Philbert, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Hastang в 1359 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 июля 1369 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mauld Trussell nació aproximadamente 1341, en Chebsey, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Warin de Trussell, tenía 11339 años y su mamá, Maud St Philbert, tenía 16 años. Se casó con John de Hastang en 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1369, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años.
